statement.text: OMG...you actaully found me! Thank you my friend, I owe you my life, I do not know how I can ever repay you. But right now I am starving! If you could get me some babyback ribs I will come with you. There are amny ways I can help to defeat our enemies and reclaim our world.

response.text: I am interested in hiring you.
Guard and return to where I am standing

statement.text: Command Menu
Weapon Classes
Melee Weapons
Other Weapons
Do any of these tasks sound like something you can do?

response.text: Hey little one, You look lost. Want to come with me? I have snacks!
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.
I am interested in hiring you.

statement.text: If you give me some Carrots I will be your best friend!
If you give me some Carrots I will be your best friend!
If you give me some Dog Food I will be your best friend!

response.text: Ok here is some Dog Food!

statement.text: If you give me some Cat Food I will be your best friend!

response.text: Ok here is some Cat Food!

statement.text: If you give me some Dog Food I will be your best friend!

response.text: Ok here is some Dog Food!

statement.text: Hi there! Got any Red Bananas? I would happy to be your friend if you have Red Bananas!

response.text: How do I get Red Bananas?

statement.text: OH I love Red Bananas! You can get them from Banana trees! But you have to use a special Harvest Blade and even then you will not always get one. Rumor has it that the elite trader will sell them, but they arent cheap!
Teleportation Station
Research Facility Teleportation System

response.text: Teleport to Sub Station Security Level 1
Teleport to Sub Station Security Level Top Secret

statement.text: Research Facility Teleportation System Entrance - Make sure you have 8 Teleporter parts in your inventory.

response.text: Enter Research Facility - Enter at Own Risk!

statement.text: Take your chance! You may get something really good or really bad!
